visual_description: A static, medium-wide shot captures a dimly lit, industrial-looking room. The central focus is a shirtless man lying on his back on a black examination table, his body slick with oil. He is wearing black boxing gloves. To the left, an older man with white hair and glasses, dressed in a suit jacket, stands with a concerned expression, holding a dark hat in his hand. To the right, another man leans over the boxer, his face close to the man's chest, appearing to speak to him. In the background, two other figures are partially visible, one of whom is tending to something on a counter. The room is illuminated by a single, harsh overhead lamp, casting a stark light on the central figures and leaving the rest of the space in deep shadow. The walls are bare and concrete, and the overall atmosphere is tense and somber. The camera remains still throughout the shot. The audio is completely silent, with no dialogue, music, or discernible sound effects, creating a still and tense atmosphere. There are no on-screen graphics.
